prompt: We finally agreed to drop the monolith and go services-first. Help me capture that decision with its context and trade-offs so the team understands the reasoning later.
note: Plain ADR request, no docs/adrs/ token and no exact intent phrase.

prompt: A pen-tester found that our login endpoint trusts a JWT without verifying its signature. Walk me through fixing it and proving the fix holds.
note: Real security task, no CVE/GHSA token.

prompt: Production is down right now and customers cannot check out. Help me coordinate the response.
note: Live incident described in prose, no status-page URL.

prompt: Our checkout API got much slower after last week's deploy; latency roughly doubled. Help me find and fix the regression.
note: Perf regression, no docs/perf/ token.

prompt: Before I merge, can you review my refactor of the auth middleware for correctness and edge cases?
note: Review request with no PR URL and no pasted diff.

prompt: We are several versions behind on our web framework and want to move up without breaking call sites.
note: Upgrade task, no manifest filename, no exact intent phrase.

prompt: Can you review our container image build for security problems and bloat?
note: Container audit described without the word Dockerfile.

prompt: This reporting query takes thirty seconds to come back. Help me make it fast.
note: Slow query, no EXPLAIN ANALYZE token and not the literal 'slow query' phrase adjacency.

prompt: I need to write the product requirements for the new notifications feature.
note: PRD task, no docs/prds/ token.

prompt: Turn this rough goal into a concrete implementation plan with steps and rough estimates.
note: Planning task, no docs/plans/ token.

prompt: The outage is resolved. We need to write the blameless postmortem now.
note: Postmortem task, no docs/postmortems/ token.

prompt: Help me threat-model the new payments service before we start building it.
note: Threat-model task, no docs/threat-models/ token.

prompt: I'm cleaning up our Dockerfile - can you audit it for security and size?
note: Names Dockerfile (path=2) and says 'audit' but not the literal intent 'audit the dockerfile' -> below threshold -> silent. Brittleness probe.

prompt: Time to bump the dependency in package.json - help me upgrade safely.
note: Incidental success: user happens to type 'bump the dependency' (exact intent) + package.json.

prompt: Let's add a short decision note under docs/adrs/ about why we picked Postgres.
note: docs/adrs/ token present (path=2) but no exact intent phrase -> silent. Brittleness probe.

prompt: Update the manifests in k8s/ to add CPU and memory limits.
note: k8s/ token present (path=2) but no exact intent phrase -> silent. Brittleness probe.

prompt: Security flagged GHSA-jfh8-c2jp-5v3q in a transitive dependency. How should we remediate it?
note: GHSA id is a hard regex signal.

prompt: We are exposed to CVE-2021-44228 in our logging stack. What is the remediation path?
note: CVE id is a hard regex signal.

prompt: Take a look at https://github.com/acme/api/pull/318 and tell me whether it is safe to merge.
note: GitHub PR URL is a hard url signal.

prompt: Here is the ticket https://acme.atlassian.net/browse/PLAT-2291 - can you summarize it for me?
note: Jira browse URL (narrowed during hardening to the browse form).

prompt: This error keeps firing: https://acme.sentry.io/organizations/acme/issues/445667/ - can you dig into it?
note: Sentry issue URL (narrowed to sentry.io organizations/issues form).

prompt: Here is the EXPLAIN ANALYZE output showing a seq scan on orders. Help me optimize this query.
note: EXPLAIN ANALYZE path token + 'optimize this query' exact intent.

prompt: Pull up Linear issue https://linear.app/acme/issue/ENG-884 and summarize the thread.
note: linear.app issue URL is a hard url signal.

prompt: Please audit the dockerfile for security and best practices.
note: Dockerfile path + 'audit the dockerfile' exact intent.

prompt: Upgrade the dependency in requirements.txt to the latest and fix the call sites.
note: requirements.txt path + 'upgrade the dependency' exact intent.

prompt: Should we keep supporting TLS 1.2 and SHA-256, or move to newer algorithms?
note: Acronyms that resemble id keys must not fire (regression guard).

prompt: Thanks, this was really helpful. Have a great weekend!
note: Pure chit-chat.

prompt: Can you explain the difference between linear and logistic regression?
note: The word 'linear' must not fire the linear connector.

prompt: Our Jira board is a mess, but let's ignore that for now and get back to the code.
note: Bare word 'Jira' with no ticket key or URL must not fire.

prompt: I ran pytest and everything passed - what should I pick up next?
note: Test runner named but no failure; route-hint does not key on runners anyway.

prompt: Conceptually, what is the difference between a Dockerfile and a docker-compose file?
note: Dockerfile + compose tokens present (path=2 each) but no intent -> must stay silent.

prompt: Per RFC 2616, how should we set the cache-control header?
note: RFC-the-spec-number must not fire the rfc-authoring skill.

prompt: Review this PR https://github.com/acme/api/pull/77 - it is the fix for CVE-2023-1234.
note: reviewPR (url=3) competes with securityFinding (regex=3); report top + whether both appear.

prompt: Let's weigh the tradeoffs and write the architecture decision record in docs/adrs/.
note: adr and decideUnderAmbiguity both hit docs/adrs/(2)+intent(1)=3; tie -> table order. Report top + both.

prompt: We had an incident; here is the hotfix PR https://github.com/acme/api/pull/90 to review.
note: Incident phrasing alone (intent-only) must not fire respondToIncident; reviewPR should win on the PR URL.
